steps: For 8 pancakes: flour = 200g, eggs = 2, milk = 300ml. Per pancake: flour = 200/8 = 25g, eggs = 2/8 = 0.25, milk = 300/8 = 37.5ml. Tom has: flour = 750g, eggs = 10, milk = 900ml. Maximum pancakes from flour: 750 / 25 = 30. From eggs: 10 / 0.25 = 40. From milk: 900 / 37.5 = 24. The limiting ingredient is milk, giving max 24 pancakes. Check options: 24 is option A.
